---
title: "brave_search.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\brave_search.py"
loc: 116
complexity: 14
logic_score: 2.75
style_score: 3.86
intel_score: 9.33
overall_score: 4.10
---

## Intent
The `brave_search.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on BraveSearch, __init__, _ensure_quota_ledger, _read_ledger, _save_ledger, _increment_quota, is_quota_available, search, search_knowledge, main. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via BraveSearch, __init__, _ensure_quota_ledger, _read_ledger, _save_ledger, _increment_quota, is_quota_available, search, search_knowledge, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 20 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [time](file://time)
- [datetime](file://datetime)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [requests](file://requests)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [src.sentinel._bootstrap](file://src.sentinel._bootstrap)

### Exports
- `BraveSearch`
- `__init__`
- `_ensure_quota_ledger`
- `_read_ledger`
- `_save_ledger`
- `_increment_quota`
- `is_quota_available`
- `search`
- `search_knowledge`
- `main`
